title: Copper Age Backport
description: Make copper more useful with this simple backport mod (Fabric 1.21.1)
body:
# The Copper Age Backport Mod
The Copper Age Backport is a simple mod that aims To Backport The Copper Age To Minecraft Fabric 1.21.1, As I like using 1.21.1 for modding but am unable to upgrade to 1.21.9/1.21.10, so this project hopefully fills in that gap in the meantime.

Note: The mod has been discontinued and Instead I recommend migrating to The Copper Age Backport by Smallinger, the transition should be seamless as both mods used the minecraft: namespace. Find it [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/backport-copper-age)

Features:
- Copper Armor And Tools
- Copper Lanterns
- Copper Chains
- Copper Bars
- Copper Torches
- Copper Nuggets
- Lightning Rods (Have Issues IDK Why)
- Will Hopefully Be Backporting The Full Update At Some Point
- Extra: If You Upgrade Your World To 1.21.9/1.21.10 All The Custom Blocks And Items Are Kept!

This Mod *Should* Also Be Partially Compatible With Most Resource Packs For 1.21.9/1.21.10, With Exceptions Like The Copper Armor Textures And Horse Armor Textures.
